entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important pulse crop grown by smallholder farmers in the semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where pigeonpea is primarily grown.

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of germplasm accessions used for economically feasible and faster evaluation.

entities.name: GERMPLASM EVALUATION MECHANISM
entities.description: A system for assessing genetic resources, exemplified by the core collection.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The international research center in Patancheru, India, maintaining pigeonpea accessions.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The city in India where ICRISAT is located.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where ICRISAT is located.

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC ORIGIN
entities.description: The location from which accessions were collected, used as a basis for clustering.

entities.name: QUALITATIVE MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics used for cluster formation and evaluating the core collection.

entities.name: WARD'S METHOD
entities.description: A statistical clustering method used to group accessions based on morphological traits.

entities.name: NEWMAN-KEULS TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used for mean comparisons between the core and entire collection.

entities.name: LEVENE'S TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used for variances' comparisons between the core and entire collection.

entities.name: CHI-SQUARE TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used for comparison of frequency distribution between the core and entire collection.

entities.name: SHANNON-WEAVER DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: A diversity index used to compare traits between the entire and core collection.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity of genetic characteristics preserved within the core collection.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The relationships between different traits preserved in the core collection.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing pigeonpea traits, facilitated by the core collection.
